name: Henry Franklin
abstract: Henry "Skipper" Franklin (born Henry Carl Franklin on October 1, 1940) is an American jazz double bassist.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Dizzy Gillespie Quartet and Freddie Hubbard Quintet

about_quotes.speaker: Putter Smith
about_quotes.evidence: one of my very favorite bass players and people is Henry Franklin who was Hugh Masekela’s bass player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Putter Smith interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 27, 2024
